visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with brown hair styled in a side braid, wearing a pink floral pattern dress with white puffy sleeves, sits in the front passenger seat of a car. She enthusiastically presents two fruit-shaped ice cream containers—one lemon and one strawberry—to the camera. (2) She opens the strawberry-shaped container, which has a realistic red textured exterior. She takes a bite, revealing a creamy pink interior. In the background, a woman wearing a wide-brimmed straw hat and sunglasses is visible in the backseat, holding a small white dog. (3) The scene shifts to the woman opening the bright yellow lemon-shaped ice cream. She takes a bite, making a sour facial expression, then passes it to the woman in the back. The background shows trees and urban buildings passing by through the car window. (4) The woman concludes by eating more of the lemon ice cream and gesturing toward the camera while talking. The car interior is well-lit by bright, natural daylight coming through the windows.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 🇰🇷韓國便利商店爆紅的水果雪酪. [Subtitle]: 韓國超商爆紅水果冰淇淋. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是草莓口味. [Variety]: ???. [Subtitle]: 草莓? 草莓好貴喔. (3) [Subtitle]: 哇西草莓🍓. [Subtitle]: 這個是檸檬口味. (4) [Subtitle]: 原本最高人氣的口味：芒果, 水蜜桃. [Subtitle]: 但是那個賣完了. (5) [Subtitle]: 只有買到這兩個. 大家猜猜看一個多少錢? (6) [Subtitle]: 超級貴. [Subtitle]: 草莓口味. (7) [Variety]: 哇. [Subtitle]: 很好吃!!! 比我想像的還要高級欸. (8) [Subtitle]: 裡面有點像草莓果醬的東西. (9) [Subtitle]: 馬西搜~ 價格公開. (10) [Slogan]: 4000多韓幣 💰. [Slogan]: 107元 台幣 🇹🇼. (11) [Subtitle]: 太貴了! [Subtitle]: 檸檬口味. [Subtitle]: 外面有一層像巧克力的脆皮. (12) [Subtitle]: 好酸. [Subtitle]: 檸檬味超級濃. [Subtitle]: 還行~ (13) [Subtitle]: 喔???? 我是不是缺維他命啊? [Subtitle]: 好吃好吃. [Subtitle]: 但我更喜歡草莓口味! (14) [Subtitle]: 果然是草莓媽咪. [Subtitle]: 吃一吃發現其實滿好吃的. [Subtitle]: 有人吃過這個嗎?!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the front seat, 1 female passenger in the backseat.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with brown hair in a side braid, wearing a pink and white floral print dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interior of a modern car with grey headrests and seatbelts. Green trees and urban structures are visible through the windows as the car moves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female Mandarin speech begins immediately with an upbeat electronic pop BGM featuring a steady synth beat. The speaker's pitch is high and delivery is rapid. (2) A 'pop' SFX occurs as she mimics opening a lid. She continues describing the food with high vocal arousal. Short, rhythmic synth loops repeat in the background. (3) A subtle 'whoosh' transition sound occurs during a scene cut. The speaker reacts with a loud 'Wow' and exaggerated intonation. (4) The speaker's tone shifts slightly toward dramatic mock-seriousness when discussing the price, then back to high-energy excitement for the final taste test. BGM remains constant until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Tasting 1 -> Pricing -> Tasting 2 -> Final Review.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and share information about trendy fruit-shaped ice cream snacks from a Korean convenience store, highlighting their appearance, taste, and cost for a social media audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a personal review/vlog focusing on a viral trend rather than a paid promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing techniques like high-saturation colors, dynamic text overlays, and upbeat BGM to maintain high viewer engagement.
